extraction.one_line_summary: BAGGIOLI Andrea timed a late move perfectly on rolling finish inside 3km after Jumbo-Visma neutralized ALMEIDA's attack, bringing 15 riders back to selection.
tactical_patterns: INEOS Grenadiers ground tempo on Monzuce specifically targeting 16-second gap to IGITA, attempting separation via accumulation not attacks.
JUMBO-VISMA chased down 6-rider selection at 3.5km despite no GC interest, bringing 15 riders back to neutralize for stage opportunity.
IGITA marked CARAPAZ wheel-to-wheel when he attacked in points jersey, prioritizing GC defense over jersey competition despite wearing it.
BAGGIOLI attacked on rolling terrain post-descent when sextet started watching each other, exploiting tactical hesitation rather than fresh legs.

rider_signals.CARAPAZ Richard: negative: struggled slightly on final Monzuce climb despite INEOS pacing for him, needed descent to rejoin at 3.5km
rider_signals.IGITA Egan: positive: defended 16-second lead by directly marking CARAPAZ attacks rather than relying on teammates, tactically mature
rider_signals.ALMEIDA Joao: neutral: attacked to defend podium from QUINTANA but didn't commit when IGITA bridged, prioritized position over stage
rider_signals.BOUTRAGO Santiago: positive: initiated late solo move on final climb showing Bahrain aggression beyond BUITRAGO's expected role
rider_signals.BAGGIOLI Andrea: positive: demonstrated stage-specific strength on rolling finishes, won via timing not raw climbing power
